fault_hypothesis: On line 65, the average is computed by dividing `total` by `window` instead of `len(tail)`. When the series has fewer elements than the window, this produces an incorrect (too small) average.

constraints.intent: avg should be total divided by the actual number of tail samples, not by window

spec.expr: len(tail__1) == window or abs(avg__1 * len(tail__1) - total__1) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: when tail is shorter than window, avg * len(tail) should equal total

spec.expr: len(tail__1) >= window or abs(avg__1 - total__1 / len(tail__1)) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: before using avg in the return, it must equal total/len(tail) when series is shorter than window

spec.expr: __cbfl_result is None or abs(__cbfl_result - round(sum(series[-window:]) / len(series[-window:]), 6)) < 1e-3

constraints.intent: the returned value should equal the mean of the actual tail samples, not total/window
